articles.headline: As bond investors fret over an AI bubble, what to know — and how to find an opportunity
articles.description: For the first time, investors said an AI bubble was their biggest worry, according to a recent Bank of America survey. What the pros are saying.

articles.headline: NotebookLM can now summarize research in ‘cinematic’ video overviews
articles.description: Google's NotebookLM can now turn users' research and notes into fully animated "cinematic" videos, going a step further than the original video overview feature Google introduced last year. Previously, video overviews could only generate narrated slideshows, but the upgraded video overview feature uses a combination of Google's AI models, "including Gemini 3, Nano Banana Pro […]

articles.headline: X to ban users from earning revenue if they post unlabelled AI-generated war videos
articles.description: Social media feeds have been flooded with fake battle scenes since start of Iran conflictElon Musk’s X will ban users from making money on the platform if they repeatedly post unlabelled AI-generated war videos, after social media feeds were flooded with fake battle scenes from the Iran conflict.The social media platform, which has about half a billion monthly active users, will suspend people from earning revenue from posts for 90 days if they put up AI-generated videos of an armed conflict without adding a disclosure that it was made with AI. A second infraction wouldlead to a permanent ban, it said on Tuesday night, after the first days of the conflict in Iran were marked by a torrent of bogus online footage. Continue reading...

articles.headline: YuanLab AI Releases Yuan 3.0 Ultra: A Flagship Multimodal MoE Foundation Model, Built for Stronger Intelligence and Unrivaled Efficiency
articles.description: How can a trillion-parameter Large Language Model achieve state-of-the-art enterprise performance while simultaneously cutting its total parameter count by 33.3% and boosting pre-training efficiency by 49%? Yuan Lab AI releases Yuan3.0 Ultra, an open-source Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) large language model featuring 1T total parameters and 68.8B activated parameters. The model architecture is designed to optimize performance […] The post YuanLab AI Releases Yuan 3.0 Ultra: A Flagship Multimodal MoE Foundation Model, Built for Stronger Intelligence and Unrivaled Efficiency appeared first on MarkTechPost.

articles.headline: How to Build an EverMem-Style Persistent AI Agent OS with Hierarchical Memory, FAISS Vector Retrieval, SQLite Storage, and Automated Memory Consolidation
articles.description: In this tutorial, we build an EverMem-style persistent agent OS. We combine short-term conversational context (STM) with long-term vector memory using FAISS so the agent can recall relevant past information before generating each response. Alongside semantic memory, we also store structured records in SQLite to persist metadata like timestamps, importance scores, and memory signals (preference, […] The post How to Build an EverMem-Style Persistent AI Agent OS with Hierarchical Memory, FAISS Vector Retrieval, SQLite Storage, and Automated Memory Consolidation appeared first on MarkTechPost.

software_engineering.headline: AI Bubble Worries Rise Among Investors, Bank of America Survey Shows
software_engineering.what_changed: A recent Bank of America survey indicates that investors now consider an AI bubble their biggest concern.
software_engineering.why_care: Understanding market sentiment around AI can inform your career planning and investment in AI-related skills or projects.
software_engineering.what_to_do: Research the current valuation metrics of major AI companies and compare them to traditional tech companies this week.

software_engineering.headline: Google NotebookLM Now Creates 'Cinematic' Video Overviews from Research
software_engineering.what_changed: Google's NotebookLM can now transform your research and notes into fully animated 'cinematic' videos, upgrading from previous narrated slideshows.
software_engineering.why_care: This feature could streamline your documentation, presentation, or knowledge-sharing processes by automating video content creation from technical notes.
software_engineering.what_to_do: Experiment with NotebookLM to convert a technical document or project summary into a video overview this week.

software_engineering.headline: X to Ban Revenue for Unlabeled AI-Generated War Videos
software_engineering.what_changed: X will suspend users from earning revenue for 90 days if they repeatedly post AI-generated war videos without disclosure, with a second infraction leading to a permanent ban.
software_engineering.why_care: This policy highlights the growing importance of AI content provenance and ethical AI use, which impacts your development of AI-powered content generation tools.
software_engineering.what_to_do: Review your current or planned AI content generation workflows to ensure they include clear disclosure mechanisms for synthetic media this week.

software_engineering.headline: YuanLab AI Releases Yuan 3.0 Ultra: Efficient Multimodal MoE Foundation Model
software_engineering.what_changed: YuanLab AI has released Yuan 3.0 Ultra, an open-source multimodal Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) model with 1T total parameters and 68.8B activated parameters, boasting improved efficiency.
software_engineering.why_care: This new model offers a more efficient approach to large language models, which could influence your architectural decisions for deploying or integrating AI solutions.
software_engineering.what_to_do: Explore the Yuan 3.0 Ultra documentation and consider its potential applications for your enterprise projects this week.

software_engineering.headline: Tutorial: Build a Persistent AI Agent OS with Hierarchical Memory and FAISS
software_engineering.what_changed: A new tutorial details how to build an EverMem-style persistent AI agent OS using hierarchical memory, FAISS vector retrieval, and SQLite storage.
software_engineering.why_care: This guide provides practical steps for you to implement advanced memory management in AI agents, enhancing their ability to recall and use past information.
software_engineering.what_to_do: Follow the tutorial to set up a basic persistent AI agent with hierarchical memory on your local machine this week.

healthcare.what_to_do: Review your organization's current AI adoption plans and assess their long-term sustainability and value.

healthcare.headline: Google NotebookLM Now Creates 'Cinematic' Video Summaries of Research
healthcare.what_changed: Google's NotebookLM can now transform your research and notes into fully animated 'cinematic' videos, upgrading from narrated slideshows.
healthcare.why_care: This tool could help you quickly synthesize and present complex medical research or patient case studies in an engaging visual format.
healthcare.what_to_do: Explore NotebookLM's new video overview feature to see how it can simplify your research summaries this week.

healthcare.headline: X to Ban Revenue for Unlabelled AI-Generated War Videos
healthcare.what_changed: X will now ban users from earning revenue for 90 days if they repeatedly post unlabelled AI-generated war videos, with a second infraction leading to a permanent ban.
healthcare.why_care: This policy highlights the growing concern over misinformation and deepfakes, which can impact public health messaging and patient trust.
healthcare.what_to_do: Verify the authenticity of any visual information you encounter on social media, especially regarding health-related news or crises, before sharing.

healthcare.headline: YuanLab AI Releases Yuan 3.0 Ultra: Efficient Multimodal MoE Foundation Model
healthcare.what_changed: YuanLab AI has released Yuan 3.0 Ultra, an open-source Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) large language model that reduces total parameters by 33.3% while boosting pre-training efficiency by 49%.
healthcare.why_care: More efficient and powerful AI models like this could lead to faster development of healthcare applications, from diagnostics to administrative tasks.
healthcare.what_to_do: Stay informed about new open-source AI models that could potentially be integrated into future healthcare technology solutions.

healthcare.headline: Tutorial: Building Persistent AI Agents with Hierarchical Memory and SQLite Storage
healthcare.what_changed: A new tutorial details how to build an EverMem-style persistent AI agent operating system using hierarchical memory, FAISS vector retrieval, and SQLite storage.
healthcare.why_care: This advancement in AI agent memory and persistence could lead to more reliable and context-aware AI tools for clinical decision support or patient interaction.
healthcare.what_to_do: Discuss with your IT or innovation team how persistent AI agents could improve workflow or patient care within your department.

education.why_care: Agents with enhanced memory capabilities could revolutionize personalized learning by remembering individual student progress and preferences over time.

media_content.headline: X to Ban Revenue for Unlabeled AI War Videos, Citing Fake Content Flood
media_content.what_changed: X will ban users from earning revenue for 90 days if they repeatedly post unlabelled AI-generated videos of armed conflicts, with a second infraction leading to a permanent ban.
media_content.why_care: This policy directly impacts your ability to monetize content on X and underscores the critical importance of transparently labeling AI-generated media to maintain trust.
media_content.what_to_do: Always label any AI-generated video content you post on X, especially if it depicts sensitive topics like armed conflict, to avoid revenue suspension.

media_content.headline: YuanLab AI Releases Yuan 3.0 Ultra, a More Efficient Multimodal AI Model
media_content.what_changed: YuanLab AI has released Yuan 3.0 Ultra, an open-source multimodal Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) foundation model with 1 trillion total parameters, designed for stronger intelligence and improved efficiency.
media_content.why_care: This new model could lead to more powerful and accessible AI tools for content generation, research, and analysis, potentially improving your workflow efficiency.
media_content.what_to_do: Keep an eye on new AI applications and tools that integrate Yuan 3.0 Ultra, as they may offer enhanced capabilities for your content creation tasks.

media_content.headline: New Tutorial Shows How to Build Persistent AI Agent OS with Memory
media_content.what_changed: A new tutorial details how to build an EverMem-style persistent AI agent operating system that combines short-term conversational context with long-term memory using FAISS and SQLite.
media_content.why_care: Understanding how these advanced AI memory systems work can help you better leverage AI for research, fact-checking, and developing more sophisticated interactive content.
media_content.what_to_do: Explore the concepts of hierarchical memory in AI agents to understand how future tools might retain and recall information more effectively for your projects.
